summary: Iteration 71: Testing mobile responsiveness, navigation, auth flows, and UI components. All tests passed. Backend: 13/13 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All critical UI flows verified including mobile hamburger menu, theme toggle, auth gate, and bottom elements positioning.

issues: Calculator page shows auth gate modal - expected based on business logic for unauthenticated users

passed_tests: === BACKEND API TESTS (13/13 Passed) ===
✅ GET /api/health returns status=ok
✅ GET /api/stats/live returns live stats with regions (56 total slots)
✅ POST /api/auth/register (client) creates user successfully
✅ POST /api/auth/register (company) validates 9-digit bulstat
✅ POST /api/auth/register (designer) correctly REJECTED (400)
✅ POST /api/auth/login invalid credentials returns 401
✅ POST /api/auth/login valid credentials returns token
✅ GET /api/categories returns 15 construction categories
✅ GET /api/companies returns companies list
✅ GET /api/companies?user_type=company/master filters correctly
✅ POST /api/test-ai checks AI connection status
✅ GET /api/calculator/status requires authentication
✅ GET /api/reviews returns reviews with stats
=== FRONTEND UI TESTS (All Passed) ===
✅ Desktop landing page loads with all navigation links visible
✅ Desktop navigation: Главна, Калкулатор, Фирми и Майстори, Обяви, Още dropdown
✅ Login/Register buttons visible for unauthenticated users
✅ Theme toggle (🌙/☀️) works - toggles between light and dark mode
✅ Desktop live counter sidebar visible with stats
✅ Mobile (390x844): Desktop nav hidden, hamburger menu visible
✅ Mobile hamburger menu opens and shows 15+ navigation links
✅ Mobile menu shows live stats section (clients, фирми, майстори, FREE)
✅ Mobile live counter bar positioned at bottom (y=739px)
✅ AI Designer (/room-scan): Auth gate modal shown for unauthenticated users
✅ Auth gate shows 'Само за регистрирани' with Вход/Регистрация buttons
✅ Companies (/companies): Public page with 'Как работи?' info section
✅ Companies page: 3 tabs (Всички, Фирми, Майстори)
✅ Desktop 'Още' dropdown shows: AI Sketch, 3D Photo Designer, Готови проекти, Услуги, Професии, Блог, Общност, AI Търсене, Класация, За нас, Обратна връзка
✅ Mobile bottom elements (chatbot, feedback, live counter) positioned correctly without excessive overlap
✅ Chatbot button: bottom-right (y=644px), Feedback button: bottom-left (y=666px)
critical_code_review_comments: ✅ Mobile navigation uses lg: breakpoint correctly - hamburger menu shows on mobile
✅ All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing
✅ Theme toggle persists state and correctly switches colors
✅ Auth gate properly blocks AI Designer for unauthenticated users
✅ Live counter displays real-time stats with per-region breakdown
✅ Mobile bottom elements are stacked vertically with adequate spacing
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed users during API tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 71 verified all key features: 1) Mobile hamburger menu works with lg: breakpoint. 2) Theme toggle switches between dark/light modes. 3) AI Designer shows auth gate for unauthenticated users. 4) Companies page is public with 'Как работи?' info section. 5) Desktop 'Още' dropdown shows all additional pages. 6) Mobile bottom elements (chatbot, feedback, live counter) are positioned correctly without overlap. 7) All backend auth endpoints work correctly including designer rejection.

mobile_responsiveness.hamburger_menu: Works - opens with all navigation links
mobile_responsiveness.breakpoint: lg: (1024px) - desktop nav hidden below this
mobile_responsiveness.bottom_elements: Properly stacked - chatbot (right), feedback (left), live counter (center-bottom)

auth_gate.ai_designer_page: Shows auth gate modal with Вход/Регистрация buttons

live_stats.desktop: Sidebar with online count, clients, companies, masters, free slots
